name: Green Beans and Bamboo Shoots
recipeInstructions:
1. French cut the green beans.
2. Cut bamboo shoots into 1/2-inch pieces.
3. Cover and microwave the frozen green beans in a 1-quart casserole on high until tender, about 6 to 7 minutes. Drain.
4. Stir in the remaining ingredients (margarine, salt, sugar, ground ginger).
5. Microwave uncovered until hot, about 1 minute.
